name: Negative Offset Demo
description: Demonstrates negative offsetSeconds: Step B runs indefinitely until Step A is started, which caps Step B at 20 minutes remaining. A secondary example shows a prep step that starts 5 minutes before the main cooking step finishes.

tracks.name: Main Cooking
tracks.description: A slow-cooking step that runs indefinitely until the finishing step is started

steps.name: Prep Ingredients
steps.description: Chop vegetables, measure spices, and prepare all ingredients

steps.name: Slow Braise
steps.description: Braise the meat low and slow — run indefinitely until the finishing sauce step is started, which will cap the remaining time at 20 minutes

steps.name: Rest and Serve
steps.description: Let the meat rest, then plate and serve

tracks.name: Finishing Sauce
tracks.description: The finishing sauce that, when started, caps the braise at 20 more minutes

steps.name: Make Finishing Sauce
steps.description: Starting this step signals that the braise has 20 minutes left. Prepare the reduction sauce during that time.

steps.name: Combine and Glaze
steps.description: Combine the sauce with the braised meat and glaze under the broiler

steps.name: Cook Rice
steps.description: Start rice in the rice cooker
